narrative:
Precinct West Twp East Rochester (precinct in Columbiana County) has 1,296 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.8 percentage points.
